evidence_gate: Compare starter kit against single-holder offer; interview desk users with multiple accessories
release_rule: Do not finalize products unless starter-kit intent exceeds single-item intent or produces higher contribution margin

evidence_gate: Must solve a complete day-one desk organization job
release_rule: Launch only with all included accessories independently useful

evidence_gate: Customers must report running out of base capacity
release_rule: Hold if expansion intent is not observed

evidence_gate: Keys/adapters/USB items recur in desk evidence
release_rule: Keep only if used weekly in observation

evidence_gate: Writing and hand-tool storage recurs across desk/craft categories
release_rule: Keep only if fit covers common object ranges

evidence_gate: Cable disorder recurs across desk/gaming/creator use
release_rule: Reject variants requiring heat or high pull load

evidence_gate: Phone stands are common desk purchases
release_rule: No charging electronics or heat-generating function

evidence_gate: Paper/card visibility is a distinct desk use case
release_rule: Release only if not redundant with catch-all tray

evidence_gate: Small-component sorting appears across craft/camera/3D printer use
release_rule: Avoid tiny removable parts intended for young children

evidence_gate: Headphone holders show substantial paid demand
release_rule: Low-load indoor use only; validate creep and accidental impact

evidence_gate: Color/name customization is visible in gaming and pet/desk markets
release_rule: Sell only when personalization adds margin after labor

evidence_gate: Test camera batteries/cards and craft tools with real owners
release_rule: One shared need must produce repeat intent before permanent listing

evidence_gate: Test controller/headphone and collectible display expansion
release_rule: Exclude licensed characters and model-specific claims without fit evidence

evidence_gate: Use sales, attach rate, returns and second-order behavior from months 2-5
release_rule: Kill low-attach modules; do not preserve SKU count for appearance
